Best Free AI Tools for Developers

Every tool on this page has a free tier or open-source option. No credit card required to get started.

📚 Want more free AI tools?

We curate the best free AI tools weekly. Join 2,000+ developers.

CodingFree for OSS

GitHub Copilot

AI code completion and suggestions. Free tier available for verified students, teachers, and open-source maintainers.

Try Free →
CodingFree Tier

Cursor

AI-native code editor with chat and multi-file editing. Free tier includes limited AI completions.

Try Free →
Coding100% Free

Codeium

AI-powered code completion across 70+ languages. Completely free for individual use.

Try Free →
ChatbotFree Tier

Claude

Anthropic's AI assistant. Free tier with Claude 3.5 Sonnet — no credit card required.

Try Free →
ChatbotFree Tier

ChatGPT

OpenAI's flagship chatbot. Free tier gives access to GPT-3.5 and basic features.

Try Free →
ChatbotFree Tier

Gemini

Google's AI assistant. Free tier includes Gemini Pro with generous usage limits.

Try Free →
ML Platform100% Free

Hugging Face

Open-source ML hub with free model hosting, datasets, and inference API.

Try Free →
APIFree Tier

Groq

Ultra-fast LLM inference. Free tier includes generous rate limits on multiple models.

Try Free →
MonitoringOpen Source

Langfuse

Open-source LLM observability. Self-host for free or use the generous cloud free tier.

Try Free →
AnalyticsFree Tier

PostHog

Product analytics, session replay, and feature flags. Generous free tier for startups.

Try Free →
BackendFree Tier

Supabase

Open-source Firebase alternative with database, auth, and real-time. Free tier is generous.

Try Free →
HostingFree Tier

Vercel

Frontend deployment platform. Free tier covers hobby projects with 100GB bandwidth.

Try Free →
CodingFree Tier

Tabnine

AI code completion with on-premise deployment. Free tier for individual developers.

Try Free →
CodingFree Tier

Cody

Sourcegraph's AI coding assistant with codebase search context. Free tier available.

Try Free →
APIFree Credits

Together AI

Open-source model hosting and inference. Free credits for new users.

Try Free →
APIFree Tier

Replicate

Run open-source models via API. Free tier includes limited inference credits.

Try Free →
ProductivityFree Core

Raycast

Mac productivity launcher with AI features. Core app is free forever.

Try Free →
ProductivityFree Tier

Notion

Workspace with AI writing assistant. Free tier for personal use.

Try Free →

How to Choose Free AI Tools

Most AI tools offer free tiers to get you hooked. Here's what to look for:

  • Usage limits: Check how many API calls, completions, or messages you get per month.
  • Model access: Free tiers often give you older or smaller models. The best free tiers include flagship models.
  • No credit card: The best tools let you start completely free without entering payment info.
  • Open source: Self-hosted tools like Langfuse and Stable Diffusion are truly free — no limits, no catches.

All tools listed above meet at least one of these criteria. We update this page regularly as new tools launch or change their pricing.

Affiliate Disclosure: AI Tools Hub is supported by our readers. Some links on this site are affiliate links, meaning we may earn a commission if you make a purchase through them — at no extra cost to you.
